1813730.name: Outpost
1813730.description:
Note: Outpost was an experimental game that is no longer in development. Enjoy the free Early Access demo and check out the newest Lunar Workshop titles below!


Outpost is a building and planet exploration game. An entire planet is available for you to explore.

Outpost is in an early alpha development state. We have released the very first playable version of the game with only a few features. Additional features will be added over time, one release every month.

Current features:
  • Explore and collect resources.
  • Build and customize your home.
  • Walk around the entire planet if you like, but it will take you a very long time.
